title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Cancel [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device permission prompt reappears after tapping "Cancel" and restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure a headset is connected.
2. From the Home screen, tap the menu icon to open the Poly Lens Menu.
3. Tap "Find My Device" in the menu.
4. When the location permission prompt appears, tap "Don't Allow".
5. Observe the permission explanation dialog with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options.
6. Tap "Cancel" on the permission explanation dialog.
7. Verify the app navigates back to the Poly Lens Menu.
8. Tap "Find My Device" again from the Poly Lens Menu.
9. Observe whether the location permission prompt appears again.
10. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
11. From the Home screen, tap the menu icon to open the Poly Lens Menu.
13. Observe whether the location permission prompt appears.
expected: After tapping "Don't Allow" and then "Cancel", the user should be returned to the Poly Lens Menu. Re-entering Find My Device should show the permission prompt again. After restarting the app, the permission prompt should still appear each time Find My Device is accessed, as the permission was denied.
